description:
A mobile client for Pixelfed and Vernissage
Pixelix is an open source client for the Fediverse photo sharing platforms Pixelfed and Vernissage.

 - Material Design
 - Multi-accounts support
 - Dark and light theme
 - Profile settings
 - Home / local / global timelines
 - Trending posts, trending hashtags, trending profiles
 - Custom app icons
 - Post templates
 - Open source
